easy.tooShort: Movies are almost never this short
easy.subtitle: Let’s find something good to watch tonight.
easy.actorsHint: We’ll favor movies starring the actors you add — and remember them next time.
easy.noneFound: We couldn’t find three with those settings.
easy.noneFoundHint: Try loosening a setting above, or tell us a few movies you love.
easy.ownWords: Tell us in your own words — type or talk.

import.noTitles: No titles found. Paste a list, or choose a CSV export (Letterboxd, Trakt, Simkl, TV Time, Netflix…).
import.anyCsv: Any CSV export, or one title per line
import.doneSimple: Done — added {added} to your watched list.
import.doneBoth: Done — added {added} to your watched list · {unmatched} couldn’t be matched.
import.couldntMatch: Couldn’t match these (title may differ on TMDB):

importPage.heading: Import your history
importPage.intro1: Coming from another app? Drop in a
importPage.intro2: — or paste a list. We’ll match each title, carry over your ratings, and mark it watched, so your history and DNA show up right away.
importPage.worksWithRest: — anything with a title (and optional rating) column. Ratings on a 5-star scale (Letterboxd) are converted to /10 automatically; TV episodes collapse to one entry per show.
importPage.zipHint2: , unzip it first and pick the
importPage.zipHint3: inside. If your file only has IDs and no titles, export to Letterboxd or Trakt first, then bring that CSV here.

photo.noText: Couldn’t read any text. Try a shot where the title is clearly visible (a pause or info screen works great).
photo.noMatch: Couldn’t find a matching title in that photo.
photo.readError: Something went wrong reading the image.
photo.title: 📸 Add from a photo
photo.subtitle: Snap or screenshot what’s on the TV — I’ll read the titles and let you tap the ones to save. No setup.

found.one: Found {count} possible title — tap to add:
found.other: Found {count} possible titles — tap to add:

photo.whatIRead: What I read from the photo

fresh.couldNotStart: Could not start a fresh session.

learn.couldNotStart: Could not start your learning session.
learn.settingUp: Setting up your learning session — this one remembers.
learn.keepPicking: Keep making picks and your VERD1CT DNA sharpens over time.

install.headline: Keep WatchVerdict one tap away
install.generic: Add it to your home screen — it opens full-screen, like an app.

guestSave.validation: Enter an email and a password of 6+ characters.
guestSave.savedBody1: Everything you’ve saved is now tied to
guestSave.savedBody2: . Sign in with it on any device and your list and taste come with you.
guestSave.formBody: Keep your watchlist, ratings, and taste — and use them on any device. No re-doing anything.

simpleMode.description: Bigger text and buttons, higher contrast — easier to read and tap. Tap again to turn off.
simpleMode.title: Simple view: bigger text and buttons

viewMode.toDesktopTitle: See the full desktop layout on your phone

desktopExit.title: Switch back to the phone-friendly layout
desktopExit.label: Back to phone view

onTv.reminderSetNotif: Reminder set! Turn on notifications in Settings so we can ping you before it starts.
onTv.reminderSet: Reminder set — we’ll ping you 1 hour and 5 minutes before. ⏰
onTv.wentWrong: Something went wrong. Please try again.
onTv.nothingUp: Nothing notable coming up right now.
onTv.heading: 📡 Good things coming up on TV
onTv.subheading: The next few days — tap 🔔 to be reminded before it starts.

vintage.title: Vintage Mode
vintage.subtitle: Big and simple. Just tap a button.
vintage.tvNowSub: Live channels and times, big and clear
vintage.tasteGameSub: A few taps teaches us what you like
vintage.remindersSub: Shows you asked to be reminded about

easy.tooShort: Las películas casi nunca son tan cortas
easy.subtitle: Busquemos algo bueno para ver esta noche.
easy.actorPlaceholder: Escribe el nombre de un actor…
easy.actorsHint: Daremos prioridad a las películas con los actores que agregues, y los recordaremos la próxima vez.
easy.noneFound: No encontramos tres con esos ajustes.
easy.noneFoundHint: Prueba aflojar un ajuste de arriba, o dinos algunas películas que te encanten.
easy.ownWords: Dínoslo con tus palabras: escribe o habla.

import.noTitles: No se encontraron títulos. Pega una lista o elige una exportación CSV (Letterboxd, Trakt, Simkl, TV Time, Netflix…).
import.anyCsv: Cualquier exportación CSV, o un título por línea
import.doneSimple: Listo: se añadieron {added} a tu lista de vistos.
import.doneBoth: Listo: se añadieron {added} a tu lista de vistos · no se pudieron emparejar {unmatched}.
import.couldntMatch: No se pudieron emparejar estos (el título puede diferir en TMDB):

importPage.heading: Importa tu historial
importPage.intro2: — o pega una lista. Emparejaremos cada título, traeremos tus calificaciones y lo marcaremos como visto, para que tu historial y tu ADN aparezcan enseguida.
importPage.worksWithRest: — cualquiera con una columna de título (y calificación opcional). Las calificaciones en escala de 5 estrellas (Letterboxd) se convierten a /10 automáticamente; los episodios de TV se agrupan en una entrada por serie.
importPage.zipHint3: que está dentro. Si tu archivo solo tiene IDs y no títulos, exporta primero a Letterboxd o Trakt y luego trae ese CSV aquí.

photo.noText: No se pudo leer ningún texto. Prueba con una toma donde el título se vea claramente (una pausa o una pantalla de información funcionan muy bien).
photo.noMatch: No se encontró un título que coincida en esa foto.
photo.readError: Algo salió mal al leer la imagen.
photo.title: 📸 Añadir desde una foto
photo.subtitle: Toma o captura lo que está en la tele: leeré los títulos y podrás tocar los que quieras guardar. Sin configurar nada.

guestSave.formBody: Conserva tu lista, tus calificaciones y tus gustos, y úsalos en cualquier dispositivo. Sin rehacer nada.

importPage.intro1: 从别的应用来？放入一个

importPage.worksWith: 适用于这些平台的 CSV 导出：
importPage.worksWithRest: ——只要有标题列（评分列可选）即可。5 星制评分（Letterboxd）会自动换算为 /10；电视剧集会合并为每部剧一条记录。
importPage.orJustPaste: 或者直接粘贴一个列表：

importPage.zipHint3: 文件。如果你的文件只有 ID 没有标题，请先导出到 Letterboxd 或 Trakt，再把那个 CSV 拿到这里。
